arc.title: Pause: Gandalf's Visit → Thorin Arrives

children.title: Preparación de comida
children.prompt: En Hobbiton, durante la afternoon, la Compañía intenta preparar una comida. Puede haber dificultad con el fuego, discusión sobre quién cocina, reclamos de hambre, o alguien que encuentra algo inesperado en sus provisiones. El tono debe ser doméstico y ligeramente cómico. NO inventes comida abundante si las raciones son escasas. NO adelantes eventos de 'Thorin Arrives'.
canon_constraints: Bilbo should generally stay at 'Hobbiton' unless briefly stepping away and returning.

arc.title: The Long Captivity

children.title: Act I: The Fall

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: The waking is cold and abrupt in the elven cells.
An elven guard leaves cold rations in the corridor.
They eat in silence, each in their own cell or in small watched groups.
Dungeon silence. Only dripping water and distant guard footsteps.
Second ration of the day. The bread is hard and the soup is tasteless.
Someone meditates on their captivity as the sun moves slowly through a slit.
Two prisoners exchange whispered words between the bars.
Evening meal. Darkness falls outside the high windows.
The elven guards change shift. The prisoners listen closely.
Fragmented sleep in cold cells. Nightmares of chains and darkness.
The dungeon sleeps. Absolute silence until dawn.
Brief cold sleep before the guards stir.
A guard passes close. The prisoners freeze in their blankets.
Silence returns, heavy as iron.
Shallow dreams before the distant bell of morning.
The last hours of night drag on in darkness.
Final restless hour before the cell door creaks.
A guard changes shift in the corridor beyond.
Silence stretches until the first grey light.

special_events.title: Disarming and separation
special_events.prompt: Los elfos quitan armas y separan a la Compañía. Thorin protesta. Bilbo, invisible, observa desde un rincón.

special_events.title: Thorin to the deepest cell
special_events.prompt: Thorin es arrastrado a la celda más profunda. Los demás enanos lo ven irse en silencio impotente.

special_events.title: Bilbo discovers freedom
special_events.prompt: Bilbo se da cuenta de que su invisibilidad le permite moverse entre las celdas sin ser detectado. Una mezcla de pánico y esperanza.

children.title: Act II-III: The Long Routine

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Mechanical waking. They are no longer surprised by where they are.
Morning ration. Low-voiced conversations about meals long past.
Bilbo uses his invisibility to explore the palace unseen.
Midday meal. Some dwarves play cards in silence.
Afternoon emptiness. Few move. Time seems to stand still.
Supper. A dwarf tells a story everyone already knows but listens to again.
Bilbo visits another cell to exchange news and hope.
Elven guards watch. The prisoners pretend to sleep.
Night of heavy dreams. Some wake not knowing what day it is.
The palace sleeps around them.
Deeper sleep before the distant footsteps of dawn guards.
Silence stretches toward morning.
The last cold hour before waking.

special_events.title: Distant elf feast
special_events.prompt: Los elfos celebran una gran fiesta. Música y luces llegan hasta las celdas. Los enanos sienten envidia, repulsión y hambre.

special_events.title: Season change
special_events.prompt: Un cambio de temperatura anuncia el paso del tiempo. Alguien cuenta los días y se equivoca.

special_events.title: Bilbo contacts all dwarves
special_events.prompt: Bilbo ha logrado susurrar a cada enano al menos una vez. La red de comunicación está completa.

children.title: Act IV: The Plan

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Early waking. There is a new electricity in the air.
They prepare food in haste, eager for the day's meetings.
Bilbo reports to Thorin from the door of his cell about what he has seen.
Bilbo mentally maps escape routes, counting guards and doors.
Quick meal. The conversation is conspiratorial and tense.
Bilbo contacts another dwarf, passing instructions of the barrel plan.
Thorin and the leaders discuss the plan: who goes first, which barrel, when.
Supper. The mood is a mixture of fear and contained hope.
Tense vigil. Every sound could be an opportunity or a betrayal.
Sleep interrupted by excitement. Tomorrow might be the day.
The palace breathes around them in darkness.
Half-dreams of barrels and rushing water.
Silence before the first grey light.
The final cold hour before dawn.

special_events.title: The barrel idea
special_events.prompt: Bilbo propone escapar en barriles por la Puerta del Agua. Al principio parece absurdo; luego, la única opción.

children.title: Act V: Escape Eve

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Waking with knots in the stomach. Tonight might be the night.
Last ration before action. They eat little, speak less.
They review the plan one last time. Signals, passwords, roles.
Midday meal with hands that tremble slightly.
Physical preparations: hiding weapons, loosening barrel lids, creating distractions.
Last whispered instructions. There is no turning back.
Supper. Some cannot eat. Others eat for the last time in captivity.
They wait for the agreed signal. Every minute is an eternity.
Deadly silence. Waiting for the exact moment.
The signal arrives. The escape begins. Furtive movement in the dark.
Bilbo guides the dwarves one by one toward the barrels. Every step is a heartbeat.
The last watch before the river takes them.
A pause in the dark, hearts pounding.
No one truly sleeps, but they close their eyes for a few minutes.
The palace breathes, unaware.
The last minutes before the escape begins in earnest.
The palace breathes, unaware.

children.title: Preparación de comida

arc.title: The Siege of Silence

children.title: Act I: The Departure

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Smaug wakes in fury. His wing-beats thunder like a storm. He flies south.
Deafening silence after the dragon's departure. No one dares to speak.
Collective waking among the dwarves. Was it a dream? No. The air smells of sulfur.
They prepare food with trembling hands. Eyes constantly look toward the sky.
Breakfast in silence. No one is hungry, but they eat out of discipline.
Should we leave? Will he return? Thorin orders to wait. Others argue in low voices.
Midday meal interrupted by glances at the southern horizon.
The dwarves cautiously explore Erebor, counting treasures and looking for alternative exits.
Supper. The gold gleams with a sinister light. No one mentions it.
Tripled watch. Every shadow might be Smaug's return.
Uneasy sleep in the halls of gold.

children.prompt: Esta fase dura 1 días. El tono general es 'terror'. Cada día sigue el patrón 'dragon_departure_day', generando bloques de chat, evento y pausa ambiental según la hora. NO adelantes eventos de 'Smaug Attacks Lake-town'. Los eventos especiales de esta fase deben ocurrir en los días indicados y sustituir un bloque normal.

special_events.title: Smaug rises
special_events.prompt: Smaug despierta en furia, destruye una estalactita con su cola, y vuela hacia el sur en una columna de fuego. El silencio que sigue es peor que el ruido.

children.title: Act II-III: The Wait

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Waking with the first thought on Smaug. Where is he now?
They check the provisions once more. Rationing begins to be strict.
Morning meal with conversations about rumors and speculations.
They roam Erebor looking for signs of return, useful treasures, or safe exits.
Midday meal. Someone tells a story to break the tension.
Private conversations about fear, family in Lake-town, and the dragon's fate.
Supper. They discuss whether to send a messenger. Thorin forbids it.
Guards at the entrance. The south wind brings the smell of smoke.
Sleep interrupted by dreams of flames and roars.
The Mountain breathes around them in darkness.
Deeper sleep despite the tension.
Silence stretches toward dawn.
The last heavy hour before waking.
The first grey light touches the eastern gate.

special_events.title: Distant roar
special_events.prompt: Un eco lejano de rugido resuena desde el sur. Todos se congelan. No vuelve a repetirse.

special_events.title: Crow brings rumors
special_events.prompt: Un cuervo negro llega a la entrada de Erebor con noticias confusas: humo al sur, pánico en el lago.

special_events.title: Debate to leave
special_events.prompt: Fili y Kili insisten en salir a ayudar. Thorin se niega rotundamente. La tensión casi rompe el grupo.

children.title: Act IV: Confirmation

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Waking with the confirmed news: Smaug has fallen.
They prepare a meal more generous than usual, almost like a celebration.
Ambivalent celebration: joy for the victory, mourning for Lake-town.
Private conversations about guilt, responsibility, and the future of the Mountain.
Midday meal. The gold begins to weigh in their glances.
What follows now? Who will claim the treasure? Who will arrive first?
Supper. Thorin speaks of restored Erebor. Some believe; others doubt.
A dwarven chant for the fallen of Lake-town. Then, silence.
Uneasy sleep. Victory tastes like ash.
The halls are dark and silent.
Dreams of fire and water mixed together.
Silence before the first grey light.
The last cold hour before dawn.
Morning approaches over the Lonely Mountain.

NO adelantes eventos de 'Homeward Bound'.

arc.title: Winter in Rivendell

children.title: Act I: Last Stretch

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Early waking to make use of the light. The road west is long.
Slow march under grey skies or fine rain. The Mountain grows small behind them.
Rest to eat. Melancholy conversations about the ending adventure.
They continue walking. The landscape softens: green hills instead of black rocks.
Evening meal. Gandalf smokes his pipe, watching the horizon.
They make camp for the last times in wild lands.
Conversations of anticipated farewell. Each night might be the last together.
Dwarven song about journeys and returns. Some join, others listen in silence.
Quiet but nostalgic sleep. Dreams of home and gold mixed together.
The camp breathes softly in the dark.
A single watchman keeps the embers alive.
Deeper sleep under familiar stars.
The last hours of night pass in stillness.
The final doze before dawn.

special_events.title: Last night at Beorn's
special_events.prompt: Última cena con Beorn. Miel, pan recién horneado, y la compañía de animales que lo obedecen.

special_events.title: Arrival at Rivendell
special_events.prompt: Cruzan el puente hacia Rivendell. Canciones élficas los reciben. El cansancio de meses empieza a disiparse.

children.title: Act II: Welcome

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Late waking in soft, luminous Rivendell rooms.
A solitary stroll through the gardens, listening to the murmur of the river.
Exploration of Rivendell gardens and halls. Everything is beautiful and ancient.
Festive meal with the elves. Fruits, sweet breads, and clear wines.
Conversation with elves or Gandalf about ancient stories and uncertain futures.
Contemplative pause beside a fountain or overlook.
Supper with elven music in the background. Wounds of body and soul heal slowly.
Elvish poetry recital, song, or dance. The dwarves watch with feigned respect.
The valley sleeps in starlight.
Deep, restorative sleep, protected by the magic of the valley.
Silence in the halls of the Last Homely House.
Dreams of green valleys and distant mountains.
An elf patrol passes without a sound.
The last gentle hour before waking.
The valley sleeps under a blanket of stars.
A last dream of distant mountains.

special_events.title: Elf concert
special_events.prompt: Un concierto nocturno en el salón de Elrond. Música que cura heridas invisibles.

special_events.title: Gandalf's whispered news
special_events.prompt: Gandalf habla en voz baja con Elrond sobre Dol Guldur. Bilbo escucha a medias, sin entender del todo.

special_events.title: Healing of wounds
special_events.prompt: Fili y Kili reciben atención médica por heridas que habían ocultado. Thorin observa con culpa.

children.title: Act III: Deep Winter

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Waking to snow on the windowsill. The fire was lit by silent elves.
Bilbo writes in his diary. Others read, play games, or simply gaze at the fire.
Light midday meal. Slow conversations about nothing in particular.
Quiet chat by the fire. Memories of the war, worries about the future.
Pause of snow and silence. The world outside seems frozen in time.
Early supper. The food is simple but comforting.
Evening of stories, poems, or improvised board games between dwarves and elves.
Ritual night round. There is no danger, but the elves keep watch.
The valley sleeps under snow.
Long, heavy sleep. Sometimes dreams of Erebor, sometimes of Hobbiton.
Silence in the snow-covered halls.
Deeper sleep before the pale winter dawn.
An elf guard shifts silently in the corridor.
The last warm hour before waking.
Snow falls softly outside the window.
The last peaceful hour before the winter dawn.

special_events.title: Bilbo starts his book
special_events.prompt: Bilbo compra un cuaderno de pergamino y empieza a escribir las primeras líneas de 'There and Back Again'.

special_events.title: Moria tales by Balin
special_events.prompt: Una noche especialmente fría. Balin cuenta la historia de Moria con detalles que nunca había compartido.

special_events.title: Thorin and Bilbo talk
special_events.prompt: Thorin y Bilbo caminan por los jardines helados. Hablan del oro, de la codicia, y del perdón. Un punto de inflexión silencioso.

special_events.title: Bilbo finishes a chapter
special_events.prompt: Bilbo cierra el cuaderno satisfecho. Ha terminado el capítulo de las arañas. Un elfo le pregunta si es poesía.

children.title: Act IV: Farewell

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Waking knowing the Rivendell days are ending.
Last walk through the valley's favorite gardens and paths.
Farewell meal with the elf-friends they made during the winter.
Farewell conversations with Elrond, Gandalf, or elf-friends. Promises to return.
Moment of solitude contemplating the valley one last time.
Emotional supper. Exchange of small gifts between dwarves and elves.
Last elvish song. The dwarves applaud with genuine respect.
The valley breathes quietly beneath the stars.
Light sleep. The packs are ready by the door.
Silence in the guest rooms.
Half-dreams of roads already walked.
An elf stands guard over the sleeping travellers.
The last gentle hour before the farewell morning.
The valley breathes quietly beneath farewell stars.
A last dream of Rivendell gardens.

special_events.title: First thaw
special_events.prompt: El hielo del río empieza a agrietarse. Los elfos cantan canciones de primavera.

special_events.title: Last feast with Elrond
special_events.prompt: Cena de despedida con Elrond. Regalos son intercambiados. Promesas de volver algún día.

special_events.title: Departure west
special_events.prompt: La Compañía parte de Rivendell hacia el oeste. El sol de primavera ilumina el Alto Paso.

arc.title: The Final Journey Home

children.title: Act I: Wet Road

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Waking under grey skies. The rain soaked everything during the night.
Slow march under fine but persistent rain. Mud clings to the boots.
Rest beneath a large tree. They eat cold but gratefully.
They keep walking. The landscape is green and humble, without great perils.
Supper in a clearing. The fire struggles to catch because of the damp wood.
They set up camp with soaked cloaks and resigned complaints.
Sad farewell song of the wild roads.
Melancholy conversations about what they left behind and what awaits.
Sleep interrupted by leaks in the tent or by the damp cold.
The rain taps against the canvas through the night.
A sodden watchman stares into the dark.
Deeper sleep despite the dripping water.
The rain slows to a whisper before dawn.
The last damp hour before waking.

special_events.title: Trollshaws gold
special_events.prompt: Desentierran el oro que habían escondido en los Trollshaws. Algunos enanos quieren quedárselo todo; Bilbo insiste en repartirlo.

special_events.title: Torrential rain
special_events.prompt: Una tormenta los obliga a refugiarse bajo un saliente de roca durante medio día. Nadie se queja demasiado.

special_events.title: Hobbit wanderer
special_events.prompt: Se cruzan con un hobbit errante que no reconoce a Bilbo. Este se da cuenta de cuánto ha cambiado su apariencia.

children.title: Act II: Familiar Road

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Waking with the sun. The road is gentler and familiar.
Relaxed walk through rounded hills and friendly woods.
Rest in the shade of an oak. Spirits lift with the good weather.
They continue at a good pace. They recognize the landscape more and more.
Evening meal with laughter and jokes about what they will do upon arrival.
Quiet camp. There is no need to watch so closely.
Lively supper. The dwarves bet on who will reach home first.
Last nocturnal confidences before the final parting.
Peaceful sleep. Tomorrow they will be one day closer to the end.
The camp sleeps under familiar stars.
A brief watch out of habit rather than need.
Deep sleep on safe ground.
The night is still and warm.
The last easy hour before waking.

special_events.title: Treasure division debate
special_events.prompt: Última discusión formal sobre el reparto del tesoro. Acuerdos firmados con el puño en el pecho.

special_events.title: Gandalf announces departure
special_events.prompt: Gandalf anuncia que se separará de la Compañía antes de llegar a Hobbiton. Nadie se sorprende, pero todos sienten pesar.

special_events.title: Bilbo gives gifts
special_events.prompt: Bilbo regala pequeños objetos de plata y esmeraldas a los enanos que lo acompañan hasta el final.

children.title: Act III: Shire Border

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Waking before dawn from excitement. Today they cross another border.
They walk on roads that are no longer wild: orderly hedges, soft meadows.
Rest beside a crystal stream. The water tastes of home.
The Hill of Hobbiton is visible in the distance. The pace quickens without anyone ordering it.
Last shared meal before the final farewells.
Camp in lands that are already the Shire. The dwarves observe with curiosity.
Final confessions, promises to visit, and the recognition of an unbreakable fellowship.
Dwarven farewell song dedicated to Bilbo. He does not know whether to laugh or cry.
Light sleep of expectation. Tomorrow they arrive.
The Shire sleeps peacefully around the camp.
A last watch in friendly lands.
Dreams of Bag End and the auction.
The night is soft and full of summer smells.
The last hour before the final morning.

special_events.title: First sight of the Hill
special_events.prompt: Desde una colina distante, ven la Colina de Hobbiton al atardecer. Bilbo se queda en silencio varios minutos.

special_events.title: Dwarves farewell
special_events.prompt: Los últimos enanos que no van a Hobbiton se despiden. Abrazos enanos: fuertes, breves, incómodos.

special_events.title: Gandalf and Bilbo alone
special_events.prompt: Gandalf y Bilbo caminan solos los últimos kilómetros. No hablan mucho. No necesitan hacerlo.

children.title: Act IV: Homecoming

day_pattern_schedule.prompt_suffix: Waking on the edge of Hobbiton. The last day of the journey.
Arrival in Hobbiton. Surprised folk, the auction in progress, the Sackville-Bagginses bewildered.
Reunion meal with old acquaintances, or solitude amid the curious crowd.
Explanations, awkward embraces, and the reclaiming of Bag End.
First real supper at home. Something simple but perfect.
Bilbo alone in his parlour. Everything is the same and everything is different.
Silence of peace. The clock on the mantelpiece ticks. The journey has ended.
First true night of sleep in one's own bed. No guards, no dragons, no mountains.
Bag End breathes softly in the dark.
Bilbo wakes briefly, remembering old fears, then smiles and sleeps again.
Deep sleep of the returned traveller.
The Shire night is quiet and safe.
The last peaceful hour before a normal morning.

special_events.title: Arrival at Hobbiton
special_events.prompt: Llegan a Hobbiton. Los hobbits los miran con curiosidad. Bilbo reconoce cada casa, cada árbol, cada olor.

special_events.title: The auction
special_events.prompt: Bilbo descubre que sus parientes los Sackville-Baggins están vendiendo sus pertenencias. Confusión, ira contenida, y un toque de humor negro.

special_events.title: Bag End at last
special_events.prompt: Bilbo entra solo a Bolsón Cerrado. Está vacío, pero es suyo. Enciende la chimenea y se sienta en su sillón favorito.

children.title: Closing transition
children.prompt: Transición final hacia 'The Auction'.
